response.justification: Aisha has extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with clear ownership of scalable systems and AI-agent infrastructure — directly aligning with core requirements. Her deep testing culture, open-source contributions, and cross-stack adaptability are strong positives, though limited explicit use of Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Java raises minor stack gaps.
strengths: Proven full-stack ownership across frontend (React/Ember) and backend (Node.js, DLang)
Strong experience with AI-agent systems and developer tooling
Demonstrated testing rigor, CI/CD, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in experience
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java usage in recent roles
German language proficiency is basic, may impact local collaboration
